Lamenting such a bad son as Absalom was very unwise and unworthy. Joab rebukes David, but not with the proper respect for his king. A straightforward case can be fairly presented to those above us, and they can be corrected for what they do wrong, but it should not be done with rudeness and arrogance. Yet David accepted the rebuke and the advice prudently and calmly. Yielding at the right time usually prevents the bad effects of mistaken actions.

God’s providence, through the priests' persuasions and Amasa's influence, brought the people to decide on recalling the king. David did not act until he received this invitation. Our Lord Jesus will rule in those who invite him to their hearts, and not until he is invited. He first softens the heart and makes it willing in the day of his power, then rules among his enemies.

Those who now disregard and mistreat the Son of David would be happy to make peace when he comes in glory; but it will be too late. Shimei wasted no time. His abuse had been personal, and with the usual right feeling of good people, David could more easily forgive it.

David remembers Mephibosheth’s estate being forfeited; and he expressed joy for the king's return. A good man willingly bears his own losses while seeing Israel in peace, and the Son of David exalted.

Barzillai thought he had honored himself by doing any service for the king. Thus, when the saints are called to inherit the kingdom, they will be amazed at the reward being so far beyond the service. A good man would not go anywhere to be burdensome; or rather be a burden to his own house than to another's. It is good for all, but especially becomes older people, to think and speak much of dying. The grave is ready for me, let me go and prepare for it.

The men of Israel thought themselves despised, and the harsh words of the men of Judah produced very bad effects. Much evil could be avoided if men would watch against pride, and remember that a gentle answer turns away anger. Though we have right and reason on our side, if we speak with fierceness, God is displeased.
